title: Shri Mahagauri Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Mahagauri Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Mahagauri.
description:
Jai Mahagauri jagat ki maya,
Jai Uma Bhavani jai Mahamaya॥
Haridwar Kankhal ke pasa,
Mahagauri tera vaha niwas॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

Chanderkali aur Mamata Ambe,
Jai Shakti jai jai Maa Jagdambe॥
Bhima Devi Vimala Mata,
Koshki Devi jag vikhyata॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

Himachal ke ghar Gori roop tera,
Mahakali Durga hai swaroop tera॥
Sati ‘Sat’ havan kund mein tha jalaya,
Usi dhuein ne roop Kali banaya॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

Bana dharm Singh jo sawari mein aaya,
To Shankar ne trishul apna dikhaya॥
Tabhi Maa ne Mahagauri naam paya,
Sharan aane wale ka sankat mitaya॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

Shanivar ko teri puja jo karta,
Maa bigada hua kaam uska sudharta॥
‘Chaman’ bolo to soch tum kya rahe ho,
Mahagauri Maa teri hardam hi jai ho॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥
